document.source_title: IPL 2026 CSK vs SRH | The intrigue over Dhoni hits fever pitch

claims.claim_text: Dhoni has not played this season due to a calf injury.
claims.evidence_text: However, so far this year, the former skipper has yet to take the field as he nurses a calf injury.

claims.claim_text: Speculation is high about Dhoni playing in the final home match against SRH.
claims.evidence_text: speculation over whether Dhoni will answer the fans’ prayers by striding onto the field for the first time this campaign has reached fever pitch.

entities.name: M.S. Dhoni
entities.description: Former captain of Chennai Super Kings and a prominent figure in IPL.
entities.evidence_text: M.S. Dhoni, speaking at a celebration event in the city, remarked, 'Hopefully, my last T20 will be in Chennai.'

entities.name: Chennai Super Kings
entities.description: IPL team that M.S. Dhoni captains.
entities.evidence_text: after guiding Chennai Super Kings to a fourth IPL title.

entities.name: Sunrisers Hyderabad
entities.description: Opponent team in the final home match for CSK.
entities.evidence_text: CSK’s final home match against Sunrisers Hyderabad.

events.event: CSK's final home match against SRH
events.evidence_text: On the eve of CSK’s final home match against Sunrisers Hyderabad on Monday.
On Sunday, the 44-year-old batted for nearly 30 minutes.
